title: ลุงวัย 62 ได้ลงทะเบียนยืนยันสิทธิแล้ว หลังร่ำไห้ไร้สิทธิบัตรคนจน พบรายชื่อตกหล่น
desc: ปลัด-พช.อำเภอแม่ริม ลุยขึ้นดอยตามหาลุงวัย 62 ปี หลังร่ำไห้ยืนยันสิทธิบัตรคนจนไม่ได้ พบรายชื่อตกหล่น สำรวจข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมใหม่เข้าเกณฑ์ พร้อมลงทะเบียนยืนยันสิทธิให้ใหม่
title_cn: 清迈老人贫困证身份恢复 遗漏名单中获得确认
summary_cn: 清迈Mae Rim县政府副县长主动上山，为一位62岁的老人办理贫困身份证。这位老人之前因行政名单遗漏而无法获得身份确认，经过补充调查纳入新的个人信息数据，符合贫困救济资格条件，已重新办理身份登记恢复福利资格。
desc_original: ปลัด-พช.อำเภอแม่ริม ลุยขึ้นดอยตามหาลุงวัย 62 ปี หลังร่ำไห้ยืนยันสิทธิบัตรคนจนไม่ได้ พบรายชื่อตกหล่น สำรวจข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมใหม่เข้าเกณฑ์ พร้อมลงทะเบียนยืนยันสิทธิให้ใหม่

title: AUDI THAILAND เตรียมเปิดตัวรถแวนสายโหด NEW RS5 AVANT QUATTRO 2026
desc: New RS5 Avant 0-100 กม./ชม. ใน 3.6 วินาที ความเร็วสูงสุด 284 กม./ชม. สเปกโรงงานเคลมตัวเลขอัตราสิ้นเปลืองน้ำมันเฉลี่ยสุดหรูไว้ที่ประมาณ 26 กม./ลิตร จนไฟแบตเตอรี่หมดเกลี้ยง ทำได้ 10 กม./ลิตร
title_cn: 奥迪泰国推出新款RS5 Avant Quattro高性能旅行车
summary_cn: 奥迪泰国（Audi Thailand）推出2026年新款RS5 Avant Quattro高性能旅行车。该车从0加速至100公里/小时仅需3.6秒，最高时速284公里/小时，性能表现出色。官方公告平均油耗约26公里/升，实际豪华驾驶模式约10公里/升，融合性能与实用性。
desc_original: New RS5 Avant 0-100 กม./ชม. ใน 3.6 วินาที ความเร็วสูงสุด 284 กม./ชม. สเปกโรงงานเคลมตัวเลขอัตราสิ้นเปลืองน้ำมันเฉลี่ยสุดหรูไว้ที่ประมาณ 26 กม./ลิตร จนไฟแบตเตอรี่หมดเกลี้ยง ทำได้ 10 กม./ลิตร

title_cn: 泰国6月6日油价更新 汽油柴油每升报价
summary_cn: 泰国2026年6月6日油价信息更新。包括泰国石油集团PTT、邦喆Bangchak、PT、加州Caltex、Susco和壳牌Shell等主要加油站的汽油、汽油混合气及柴油等各类燃油价格已公布。消费者可查询各油种每升最新价格，用于日常出行成本评估。

title: Bolt driver jailed for assault
desc: The Criminal Court has sentenced a ride-hailing driver to one month in prison and a 5,000-baht fine for assaulting a Japanese passenger in Bangkok.
title_cn: Bolt网约车司机因殴打日籍乘客被判监禁
summary_cn: 泰国刑事法庭对一名Bolt网约车司机进行判处，因其在曼谷对一名日籍乘客实施暴力，被判监禁一个月并罚款5000泰铢。此案凸显了网约车行业安全监管的重要性，也反映了泰国司法机构对乘客权益和游客安全的保护力度。
desc_original: The Criminal Court has sentenced a ride-hailing driver to one month in prison and a 5,000-baht fine for assaulting a Japanese passenger in Bangkok.

title: Opposition alleges NACC misconduct
desc: Opposition MPs and allies submitted a petition seeking a Supreme Court-led inquiry into the National Anti-Corruption Commission's (NACC) dismissal of a concealed shareholding complaint involving former transport minister Saksayam Chidchob.
title_cn: 反对党指控反贪局失职处理前部长股权案
summary_cn: 反对党议员及其盟友向最高法院递交请愿，要求对反腐败委员会（NACC）对前交通部长萨克赛姆·奇奇波（Saksayam Chidchob）隐瞒股权指控一案的驳回决定进行调查。此诉讼涉及反贪机构的问责问题和权力制约机制。
desc_original: Opposition MPs and allies submitted a petition seeking a Supreme Court-led inquiry into the National Anti-Corruption Commission's (NACC) dismissal of a concealed shareholding complaint involving former transport minister Saksayam Chidchob.

title: Land Bridge project hits new snag
desc: Thailand's flagship Land Bridge project has suffered a significant setback after an expert review committee ordered fresh Environmental and Health Impact Assessment (EHIA) studies for planned deep-sea ports in Ranong and Chumphon.
title_cn: 泰国陆路大桥项目遭新挫折
summary_cn: 泰国旗舰项目陆路大桥（Land Bridge）遭遇重大挫折，因专家评审委员会要求对罗勇（Ranong）和春蓬（Chumphon）的计划深海港口重新进行环保与卫生影响评估（EHIA），项目进度面临延缓。这是继此前多次延期后的又一波折。
desc_original: Thailand's flagship Land Bridge project has suffered a significant setback after an expert review committee ordered fresh Environmental and Health Impact Assessment (EHIA) studies for planned deep-sea ports in Ranong and Chumphon.

title: Election Commission chief risks dismissal
desc: Election Commission (EC) secretary-general Sawaeng Boonmee is facing possible dismissal after reportedly failing to meet the annual performance benchmark set by the EC, with a final decision expected this month.
title_cn: 选举委员会秘书长面临被撤职
summary_cn: 选举委员会秘书长萨翁·本密（Sawaeng Boonmee）因未达年度绩效基准而面临被撤职，最终决定预计本月宣布。此人事变动涉及泰国选举管理机构的高层变动，在政治敏感时期引发关注，也反映了对公职人员问责制度的推进。
desc_original: Election Commission (EC) secretary-general Sawaeng Boonmee is facing possible dismissal after reportedly failing to meet the annual performance benchmark set by the EC, with a final decision expected this month.

title: THAI to resume direct Amsterdam flights
desc: Thai Airways International (THAI) has confirmed it will resume direct Bangkok-Amsterdam flights from July 1, expanding its international network as the carrier works to strengthen links between Thailand and Europe.
title_cn: 泰航将恢复曼谷直飞阿姆斯特丹航班
summary_cn: 泰国国际航空公司（THAI）宣布将从7月1日起恢复曼谷至阿姆斯特丹（Amsterdam）的直飞航班，进一步拓展国际航网。此举旨在加强泰国与欧洲之间的空运连接，对国际商务旅游往来以及泰国对欧出口贸易都有助益。
desc_original: Thai Airways International (THAI) has confirmed it will resume direct Bangkok-Amsterdam flights from July 1, expanding its international network as the carrier works to strengthen links between Thailand and Europe.

title: Nominee structures thrust into the spotlight
desc: The recent crackdown on alleged nominee structures linked to foreign land ownership on Koh Phangan has reignited debate over long-standing concerns in Thailand's property sector, particularly in resort destinations popular with overseas buyers.
title_cn: 代理人结构风波升温 攀牙岛外资房产受严查
summary_cn: 泰国房产市场近期对攀牙岛(Koh Phangan)外国人通过代理人结构购地的专项查处，重新引发业界对这一长期问题的关注。此类结构在度假胜地被广泛使用，以规避外资购地限制。监管部门的行动表明，泰国正加强对房产领域的合规审查。
desc_original: The recent crackdown on alleged nominee structures linked to foreign land ownership on Koh Phangan has reignited debate over long-standing concerns in Thailand's property sector, particularly in resort destinations popular with overseas buyers.

title: Officials inch towards negative income tax
desc: The Finance Ministry is preparing a comprehensive overhaul of the government's welfare system, laying the groundwork to implement a negative income tax (NIT) system in Thailand.
title_cn: 泰国财政部推进负所得税制度改革
summary_cn: 泰国财政部正筹备政府福利体系的全面改革，计划推行负所得税(NIT)制度。该改革旨在重新设计社会保障机制，为低收入家庭提供更直接有效的经济帮助。这是泰国社会安全网制度的重大调整，涉及税收和转移支付体系的深层变革。
desc_original: The Finance Ministry is preparing a comprehensive overhaul of the government's welfare system, laying the groundwork to implement a negative income tax (NIT) system in Thailand.

title: “เสือ ดุสิต” เจอหมายจับข่มขืนและทำร้ายร่างกาย หน้าถอดสี คุมตัวเข้าห้องขัง สภ.บางกรวย
desc: “เสือ ดุสิต” เข้ามอบตัว คดีซ้อม “มิรา” ที่โรงพัก สภ.บางกรวย ถึงกับหน้าถอดสี เจอหมายจับข้อหาข่มขืนและทำร้ายร่างกาย ตำรวจคุมตัวเข้าห้องขัง ส่งฝากขังศาลจังหวัดนนทบุรี พรุ่งนี้เช้า
title_cn: 绰号「老虎」的都实因强奸和伤害罪被捕
summary_cn: 泰国警方通缉犯绰号「老虎」的都实(Dusit)因涉嫌强奸和伤害他人罪被捕，已在邦克瓦(Bang Kruai)警局关押。警方将把他送往暖武里府(Nonthaburi)法院进行正式起诉和保释听证。该案涉及严重刑事犯罪指控。

title: ซิน เคอ หยวน สตีล กลับมาเดินเครื่องผลิตเต็มสูบ หลังกรมโรงงานอุตสาหกรรมไฟเขียวให้ประกอบกิจการต่อได้

title_cn: 中韩钢铁公司获批恢复全力生产
summary_cn: 中韩钢铁公司(Sino-Korean Steel)在完成污气处理系统升级改造、达到工业部环保标准后，获泰国工业厅批准恢复生产。该公司此前因污染问题被停产整改，现已通过验收重获生产许可。这体现了泰国对工业企业环保合规性的监管力度。

title_cn: 油价调整通知 6月6日起各类油品降价
summary_cn: PTT加油站与Bangchak壳牌公司宣布下调汽油和汽油/酒精混合燃料（Gasohol）价格，每升下降70分（泰铢分单位）。该价格调整自2026年6月6日凌晨5点开始实施。这是近期油价波动中的一次重要调整，直接影响泰国车主和运输行业的日常成本。相关加油站将同步更新具体价格信息。

title: Pattaya in beach turf war as army of law enforcers reclaims public shoreline
desc: Pattaya municipal officers and partner agencies inspect Pattaya Beach during an operation targeting unauthorized chair, mat, and equipment rentals occupying public beachfront areas. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya authorities have intensified efforts to reclaim public beachfront areas from unauthorized commercial operators, carrying out ongoing inspections and enforcement actions along both Pattaya Beach and Jomtien Beach, June 5. Municipal enforcement officers, together with Pattaya City administrators, police, district officials from Banglamung, civil defense volunteers, and other relevant agencies, recently conducted coordinated operations aimed at preventing the illegal use of public space. The crackdown focused on individuals found placing chairs, mats, umbrellas, and other equipment on public beaches for rental purposes without authorization. Authorities also targeted unlicensed vendors and others using public land for commercial activities in violation of local regulations. title: Pakistani groups settle social media feud in beachfront brawl in Pattaya
desc: Police and rescue workers respond after a violent clash involving rival groups of Pakistani tourists broke out on Pattaya Beach, reportedly following a dispute that began on social media and escalated into a pre-arranged confrontation. PATTAYA, Thailand – A late-night dispute between two groups of Pakistani tourists erupted into a violent brawl on Pattaya Beach in the early hours of June 5, leaving two people injured and alarming tourists enjoying the city’s popular beachfront. Police from Pattaya City Police Station were called to the scene at approximately 1:06 a.m. after reports of a fight involving multiple individuals near the beachfront area close to the police station. According to authorities, officers led by Police Lieutenant Colonel Chewalit Suwanmanee, Deputy Inspector of Prevention and Suppression, responded alongside rescue volunteers after receiving reports of an assault with injuries. title: ‘You either adapt or get hit’ Foreigners reflect on Pattaya’s unwritten rules of the road
desc: busy Pattaya intersection highlights the challenges facing both Thai and foreign motorists, with residents increasingly calling for stronger enforcement against speeding, phone use, and reckless driving. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – For many foreigners arriving in Pattaya for the first time, one of the biggest culture shocks is not the nightlife, the beaches, or the tropical weather. It is the roads. Visitors from Europe, Australia, North America, and other countries often come from places where traffic rules are heavily enforced, road etiquette is relatively predictable, and sounding the horn is generally reserved for emergencies. In Pattaya, however, they quickly discover a different reality. Many long-term foreign residents say they initially found the local driving environment chaotic. Motorcycles pull into traffic without looking, vehicles continue through changing traffic lights, and drivers often create their own interpretation of road rules. The constant use of horns can be confusing to newcomers, particularly those who come from countries where a horn blast is often viewed as an aggressive gesture. title: Thailand races to seal U.S. trade deal as new tariff threat looms
desc: Thailand is pushing to conclude a reciprocal trade agreement with the United States this month in a bid to reduce potential tariff exposure and protect key export industries. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand is accelerating efforts to finalize a reciprocal trade agreement with the United States before the end of June after the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR) placed Thailand among countries facing a proposed 12.5% tariff under an ongoing Section 301 trade investigation. According to Deputy Prime Minister and Commerce Minister Suphajee Suthumpun, the USTR’s preliminary findings divided more than 60 trading partners into two groups. Thailand is among 46 countries facing the higher 12.5% tariff rate because it has not yet signed an Agreement on Reciprocal Trade (ART) with the United States and lacks certain measures related to imports linked to forced labor concerns. A second group of 14 countries faces a lower 10% tariff rate after implementing relevant restrictions or concluding reciprocal trade arrangements with Washington. title: Thai Airways celebrates 66th anniversary with travel deals and Amsterdam route relaunch
desc: Thai Airways executives officially open the “Rak Khun Tao Fah 2026” travel fair in Bangkok, celebrating the airline’s 66th anniversary with special promotions, loyalty rewards, and the return of flights between Bangkok and Amsterdam starting July 1. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thai Airways International has officially launched its annual “Rak Khun Tao Fah 2026” (Love You as Much as the Sky) travel fair, marking the airline’s 66th anniversary with special promotions, exclusive travel packages, and the highly anticipated return of its Bangkok–Amsterdam service. The event is being held from June 4-7, at Sphere Gallery 1 on the M Floor of EMSPHERE in Bangkok, bringing together airline executives, travel partners, and financial institutions to showcase special offers for travelers. Kittipong Sarnsomboon, Chief Commercial Officer of Thai Airways, said the event serves as a thank-you to customers and business partners who have supported the national carrier throughout its 66-year history. title: Two-tier World Cup broadcast model proposed as Thailand faces renewed rights debate
desc: Former NBTC vice chairman Col. Dr. Natee Sukonrat is calling for a two-tier World Cup broadcasting model that would keep key matches on free television while allowing subscription broadcasters to commercially exploit the remaining fixtures. PATTAYA, Thailand – As Thailand once again faces uncertainty over FIFA World Cup broadcasting rights, former National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) vice chairman Col. Dr. Natee Sukonrat has proposed a new model that he says could balance public access with commercial realities in the modern media landscape. In a Facebook post, Dr. Natee argued that Thailand should move beyond the recurring cycle that emerges every four years, when concerns arise over whether Thai viewers will be able to watch the FIFA World Cup free of charge and whether government agencies or sponsors will need to step in to secure expensive broadcasting rights. (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); According to Dr. Natee, the issue stems from a changing media environment in which FIFA increasingly treats the World Cup as a premium commercial entertainment product, while traditional free-to-air television broadcasters face declining revenues

title_cn: 泰国财政危机显现 收入下降生活成本攀升
summary_cn: 泰国财政系统面临转折点，普通民众、中小企业和商业部门的收入持续下滑，生活成本却不断攀升。加上失业率可能进一步增加，泰国人的整体财务状况处于危险边缘，民众面临收入减少、获得信贷困难、债务负担沉重等多重挑战。

title_cn: 养老基金莫陷「选错即忘」陷阱 KAsset推自动调整方案
summary_cn: 泰国超过90%的养老基金成员陷入「选择然后遗忘」的投资陷阱，从不主动调整投资组合。KAsset推出Life Path Solution方案，可根据成员年龄自动调整投资比例和资产配置，帮助成员更合理地规划退休储蓄，避免长期投资组合失衡。

title: Thailand to join UN maritime arbitration with Cambodia
desc: Thailand said on Friday it would join ‌a UN arbitration process chosen by Cambodia to resolve a decades-long maritime boundary dispute, but it has put on hold for now other two-way efforts to settle their contested borders.
title_cn: 泰国加入与柬埔寨的联合国海事仲裁程序
summary_cn: 泰国周五宣布同意加入柬埔寨选择的联合国（UN）海事仲裁程序，以寻求解决长期悬而未决的海洋边界争议。不过泰方暂时搁置了其他双边边境解决谈判，采取审慎态度。这一决定反映了泰国在区域外交中的策略调整。
desc_original: Thailand said on Friday it would join ‌a UN arbitration process chosen by Cambodia to resolve a decades-long maritime boundary dispute, but it has put on hold for now other two-way efforts to settle their contested borders.

title: Almost 15,000 illegal health products seized in Bangkok warehouse raid
desc: A warehouse raid in Bangkok’s Lat Krabang district seeking illegal dietary supplements, cosmetics and herbal products seized nearly 15,000 items worth more than 2 million baht on Friday.
title_cn: 曼谷执法部门缉获近1.5万件违法保健品
summary_cn: 曼谷执法部门周五对拉达克朗区（Lat Krabang）一处仓库进行突击检查，缉获了近1.5万件非法膳食补充剂、化妆品和草本保健产品，涉案价值超过200万泰铢。这次大规模查获行动反映了泰国对假冒伪劣保健品市场的严厉打击。
desc_original: A warehouse raid in Bangkok’s Lat Krabang district seeking illegal dietary supplements, cosmetics and herbal products seized nearly 15,000 items worth more than 2 million baht on Friday.

title: Consumer watchdog to file civil suit against Volvo Cars' Thai unit
desc: Thailand's consumer watchdog has ​approved the filing of ‌a civil lawsuit against the local unit of Volvo Cars and its repair and maintenance unit, Scandinavian Auto Co Ltd, over battery-related fires in its EX30 model, ​Pradoemchai Bunchualuai, ⁠an adviser to the minister who chairs the watchdog, said on Friday.
title_cn: 泰国消费者保护机构将对沃尔沃泰国分公司提起民事诉讼
summary_cn: 泰国消费者保护机构已批准对沃尔沃（Volvo）泰国分公司及其维修保养部门斯堪的纳维亚汽车公司（Scandinavian Auto Co Ltd）提起民事诉讼。起诉原因涉及 EX30 车型在使用中存在电池起火的重大安全缺陷。此举体现了泰国监管部门对消费者权益保护和汽车安全的认真态度。
desc_original: Thailand's consumer watchdog has ​approved the filing of ‌a civil lawsuit against the local unit of Volvo Cars and its repair and maintenance unit, Scandinavian Auto Co Ltd, over battery-related fires in its EX30 model, ​Pradoemchai Bunchualuai, ⁠an adviser to the minister who chairs the watchdog, said on Friday.

title_cn: 警惕诈骗陷阱！如何识别虚假贷款应用
summary_cn: 泰国债务危机日益严重，许多经济困难的民众转向「快速贷款应用」借贷，却不慎陷入诈骗分子的陷阱。这类虚假应用以「借款容易、快速到账」为幌子骗取个人隐私信息。文章警示消费者如何识别非法贷款应用、成为受害者后的正确救济途径，以及拒不还款可能面临的法律后果。

title: Koh Samet tightens security after attempted rape
desc: Koh Samet authorities have tightened security, ensuring all arrivals will be monitored and registered following the attempted sexual assault of a holidaymaker earlier this week.
title_cn: 高美岛加强安保措施应对性侵事件
summary_cn: 高美岛（Koh Samet）当局周五宣布实施加强版安全措施，决定对所有入岛游客进行监控和登记，直接应对本周早前发生的一起游客遭遇性侵未遂的严重事件。这一举措旨在提升游客安全保障，维护泰国旅游目的地形象。
desc_original: Koh Samet authorities have tightened security, ensuring all arrivals will be monitored and registered following the attempted sexual assault of a holidaymaker earlier this week.

title: One-fourth of voters still undecided on Bangkok governor choice
desc: Almost 30% of voters in the capital have not settled on their choice for a new Bangkok governor, a KPI poll said on Friday, as the group could threaten favourite Chadchart Sittipunt, despite his lead in the contest.
title_cn: 曼谷市长选举四分之一选民仍未定论
summary_cn: 根据KPI民调显示，曼谷近三成选民尚未确定对新任市长的投票选择，这一群体可能成为选举的关键变量。虽然候选人查查特·西提蓬（Chadchart Sittipunt）目前仍处于领先地位，但大量未决票的存在为选举增添了不确定性，可能对最终结果产生重大影响。
desc_original: Almost 30% of voters in the capital have not settled on their choice for a new Bangkok governor, a KPI poll said on Friday, as the group could threaten favourite Chadchart Sittipunt, despite his lead in the contest.

title: Thai headline inflation at 2.79% in May, below forecast
desc: Thailand's headline ​consumer price index ‌rose by 2.79% in May from a year earlier, the Commerce Ministry said on Friday.
title_cn: 泰国5月整体物价涨幅2.79% 低于预期
summary_cn: 泰国商务部周五公布5月整体消费者物价指数数据，同比上升2.79%，低于市场预期。这一相对温和的物价涨幅对在泰外国人的生活成本规划有直接影响。数据也表明，尽管面临全球通胀压力，泰国国内物价仍保持相对稳定，有利于维持经济增长势头。
desc_original: Thailand's headline ​consumer price index ‌rose by 2.79% in May from a year earlier, the Commerce Ministry said on Friday.

title: 泰国动画人用AI“爆肝”1个半月！800美金打造动画短片刷屏全网
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，一部由泰国团队制作的20分钟短篇动画电影《Tawan》（泰语意为“太阳”）在社交媒体上引发广泛关注。该片以其低成本、高效率的制作模式，引发外界对人工智能技术在动画产业应用前景的热议。 据悉，这部动画短片由泰国资深游戏与动画创作者、“Art of Vic”主页及Studio Kun创办人万查那（Wanchana Intrasombat）制作完成，并上传至其个人脸书账号。万查那表示，《Tawan》是一部实验性作品，旨在测试人工智能在动画电影制作领域的能力边界。 万查那透露，这部时长20分钟的短片总共耗时约1个半月，包括周末在内持续制作。在成本方面，视频制作费用约为500美元（约合1.6万泰铢），各类AI工具使用费用约为300美元（约合9800泰铢），项目总预算约为800美元（约合2.58万泰铢）。 在制作过程中，万查那使用了Suno Music、Cowork、Magnific、ElevenLabs以及Astra Upscale等多种AI工具，其中Astra Upscale为成本最高的一项工具。他坦言，尽管该作品与高预算专业动画相比仍有较大差距，但在创作过程中积累了宝贵经验与发现，未来将陆续与公众分享。 万查那还表示，如果外界对这部动画的制作流程感兴趣，待时机成熟后，他计划举办免费的线上工作坊，向有志于动画创作的人士分享制作方法和经验。他希望借此帮助年轻一代及怀抱创作梦想的人了解和掌握AI工具，将其作为一项实用技能，助力实现原创故事的创作梦想。 （编译：WAN；来源：PPTVHD） The post 泰国动画人用AI“爆肝”1个半月！800美金打造动画短片刷屏全网 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国动画人用AI「爆肝」1个半月！800美元打造短片刷屏全网
summary_cn: 泰国资深动画创作者万查那（Wanchana Intrasombat）仅用1个半月、耗资800美元，通过Suno Music、ElevenLabs等AI工具完成20分钟动画短片《Tawan》（泰语意为太阳）的制作。该作品凭借低成本、高效率的创作模式在网络刷屏走红，引发业界对AI技术在动画制作中应用前景的广泛探讨和思考。

title: “人民币付款”风波持续发酵！曼谷辉煌区严查79家外国餐厅
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月5日，据泰媒报道，针对近日在曼谷辉煌区引发关注的中国餐厅争议事件，辉煌区区长已下令对Pracharat Bamphen路沿线所有外国餐厅展开严格检查。涉事餐厅员工在接受调查时强调，店内从未强迫顾客使用人民币付款。 据了解，涉事中国餐厅员工在面对辉煌区政府工作人员询问时表示，餐厅并未接受人民币作为餐费支付方式。此前，一名中国男性网红发布视频称，在该餐厅用餐时被要求通过中国某支付应用扫码付款，相关视频迅速在网络上引发广泛关注和讨论。 事件发酵后，辉煌区政府联合相关部门，对Pracharat Bamphen路沿线共计79家依法注册经营的餐厅进行了实地检查，重点核查各餐厅的支付方式是否符合泰国相关法律法规。 在此次检查中，被视频指称的中国餐厅也接受了现场检查。工作人员当场扫描收银台前的二维码进行付款测试，结果显示，款项实际转入了一家泰国银行账户，该账户持有人为餐厅的中国籍老板。 针对此前争议，餐厅员工解释称，事发当天店内二维码支付系统出现故障，而顾客身上未携带现金，双方因此发生争执。随后顾客再次尝试扫描同一个二维码，第二次支付顺利完成。 作为初步整改措施，辉煌区政府已准备统一标识贴纸，张贴于餐厅门口，明确告知消费者餐厅支持以泰铢付款。相关工作人员已于检查当天开始实地张贴上述标识。 与此同时，泰国旅游观光协会主席呼吁政府部门尽快查明事实真相。目前尚无法确认网传视频内容是否完全属实，也不排除顾客与店员之间存在沟通误解的可能。 该协会同时强调，若最终调查发现相关商家确实存在拒绝接受泰铢付款，并仅通过境外账户收款的行为，相关部门必须依法严肃处理，以维护泰国金融体系的公信力，并防止地下经济活动进一步蔓延。 （编译：WAN；来源：ch7hd_news） The post “人民币付款”风波持续发酵！曼谷辉煌区严查79家外国餐厅 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 曼谷辉煌区「人民币付款风波」引发监管整顿 79家餐厅被查
summary_cn: 曼谷辉煌区因一则短视频指控中餐厅拒收泰铢、强制要求人民币付款而启动监管整顿。政府部门对沿线79家餐厅进行了合规检查，涉事餐厅解释称当日支付系统故障，款项实际流向泰国银行账户。泰国官方随后宣示，将严肃处理任何拒收泰铢或违规收款的行为，防止地下经济活动蔓延。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月5日，据泰媒报道，针对近日在曼谷辉煌区引发关注的中国餐厅争议事件，辉煌区区长已下令对Pracharat Bamphen路沿线所有外国餐厅展开严格检查。涉事餐厅员工在接受调查时强调，店内从未强迫顾客使用人民币付款。 据了解，涉事中国餐厅员工在面对辉煌区政府工作人员询问时表示，餐厅并未接受人民币作为餐费支付方式。此前，一名中国男性网红发布视频称，在该餐厅用餐时被要求通过中国某支付应用扫码付款，相关视频迅速在网络上引发广泛关注和讨论。 事件发酵后，辉煌区政府联合相关部门，对Pracharat Bamphen路沿线共计79家依法注册经营的餐厅进行了实地检查，重点核查各餐厅的支付方式是否符合泰国相关法律法规。 在此次检查中，被视频指称的中国餐厅也接受了现场检查。工作人员当场扫描收银台前的二维码进行付款测试，结果显示，款项实际转入了一家泰国银行账户，该账户持有人为餐厅的中国籍老板。 针对此前争议，餐厅员工解释称，事发当天店内二维码支付系统出现故障，而顾客身上未携带现金，双方因此发生争执。随后顾客再次尝试扫描同一个二维码，第二次支付顺利完成。 作为初步整改措施，辉煌区政府已准备统一标识贴纸，张贴于餐厅门口，明确告知消费者餐厅支持以泰铢付款。相关工作人员已于检查当天开始实地张贴上述标识。 与此同时，泰国旅游观光协会主席呼吁政府部门尽快查明事实真相。目前尚无法确认网传视频内容是否完全属实，也不排除顾客与店员之间存在沟通误解的可能。 该协会同时强调，若最终调查发现相关商家确实存在拒绝接受泰铢付款，并仅通过境外账户收款的行为，相关部门必须依法严肃处理，以维护泰国金融体系的公信力，并防止地下经济活动进一步蔓延。 （编译：WAN；来源：ch7hd_news） The post “人民币付款”风波持续发酵！曼谷辉煌区严查79家外国餐厅 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: India's IndiGo cuts six international routes, including Krabi
desc: IndiGo, India's largest airline, on Thursday said ​it would suspend operations to six international destinations, ​including Krabi, citing higher operating costs and broader pressure from continued airspace restrictions.
title_cn: 印度靛蓝航空停飞克拉比等六条国际航线
summary_cn: 印度最大航空公司靛蓝航空宣布暂停运营六条国际航线，包括泰国南部旅游枢纽克拉比（Krabi）。该决定源于持续的运营成本上升和空域限制带来的广泛压力。作为热门旅游目的地，克拉比航线的暂停将影响该地的国际游客流动及当地旅游经济。

title: Retiring in Bangkok: why hospital access beats price per sqm
desc: Retiring in Bangkok: why hospital access beats price per sqm Legacy If you are retiring in Bangkok, you have probably been filtering neighbourhoods by price per square metre , BTS stops from Sukhumvit, and how far the nearest supermarket is. That is the wrong filter. The better one is simpler: which district puts you within 15 minutes of a hospital with English-speaking specialists, JCI accreditation, and direct billing from your insurer. At 35, a bad healthcare experience in a foreign city is inconvenient. At 65, it is a different problem entirely, and the neighbourhood you choose at the start of your retirement will feel very different five or ten years in. Bangkok, to its credit, makes this easy. Its top private hospitals are concentrated in a handful of central districts, all BTS-connected, all within striking distance of the areas where foreign retirees actually live. Bangkok’s hospitals make the case for you Thailand has 68 or more JCI-accredited hospitals, placing it among the four highest counts of any country in the world. Bangkok holds the majority of these, which means that when you retire in Bangkok, you are retiring into one of the most densely populated hospital

title: Senior AIA officer hospitalised after assault in Chiang Mai restaurant
desc: Senior AIA officer hospitalised after assault in Chiang Mai restaurant Legacy An assault at a restaurant in Chiang Mai on June 4 left four people injured, including a senior executive of American International Assurance (AIA) , who is in critical condition . The incident occurred at night in a restaurant in Chiang Mai, where the insurance staff had gathered to celebrate the promotion of senior officer Thanakrit Wichiansamut. The event was attended by several colleagues, including Kantamate Withunchaisin, who later spoke to MGR Online. Kantamate said four people were injured during the incident. Thanakrit sustained the most serious injuries, including a skull fracture and bleeding on the brain, and remains hospitalised. Photo via Kantamate’s Facebook account According to Kantamate, a large group of more than 20 people was also dining at the restaurant at the same time. Before the incident, one person from that group approached AIA staff to complain about the company’s service. title: Police search for body after train collision in Pathum Thani
desc: Police search for body after train collision in Pathum Thani Legacy Police are investigating a train accident in Pathum Thani after human remains were found on railway tracks about 1 kilometre from Chiang Rak railway station today, June 5. Khlong Luang Police Station was alerted to the fatal collision on the railway line heading towards Bangkok, near the Chiang Rak canal railway bridge in Khlong Nueng subdistrict, Khlong Luang district. Patrol officers, investigators, forensic doctors from Thammasat University Hospital, and Poh Teck Tung Foundation rescue workers went to the scene. Photo via ONE 31 At the scene, officers found a severed right leg on the railway track , along with a blue shirt. A pair of black sandals and a bottle of drinking water were also found near the canal bridge. Police said the body had not yet been found because the area below the railway line was covered with thick grass and steep terrain. Khaosod reported that investigators had not yet been able to determine whether the deceased was male or female. Rescue workers were deployed to search the surrounding area for additional body parts. title_cn: 北榄火车碰撞事故：警方搜寻失踪者遗体

title: Bangkok police officers accused of stealing from drug suspect, wife
desc: Bangkok police officers accused of stealing from drug suspect, wife Legacy A Thai woman sought legal assistance, alleging that police stole her valuables seized during a raid at her condominium in Bangkok and later threatened her after she filed complaints. The 27 year old woman, Chaniporn “Manao” Charoenphum, met lawyer Ronnarong Kaewphet to request help, claiming she had not received justice following a police operation at her residence and subsequent efforts to recover her property. According to Manao, officers from Khlong Tan Police Station raided her condominium in Soi Phatthanakan 20 on June 25 last year and arrested her husband, 42 year old Wattanapong “Auan” Boonprakob, over alleged links to drug-related offences. She said her husband was later sentenced to four years and six months in prison in connection with the drug case. However, she noted that the appeal process remains ongoing. Manao said officers also searched the condo for evidence and illegal items. She stated that no illegal items were discovered during the search. Photo via ThaiRath Manao claimed that police seized several assets during the operation, including a gold necklace valued at more than 340,000 baht th

title: Koh Samet attempted rape and murder suspect faces three charges
desc: Koh Samet attempted rape and murder suspect faces three charges Legacy Police have filed three charges against the suspect in the Koh Samet attempted rape and murder case , as Rayong officials move to tighten security and restore tourist confidence. Rayong Governor Traiphop Wongtrairat led a press conference today, June 5, to provide additional details regarding the case and to announce new security measures . He was joined by Rayong Provincial Administrative Organisation president Piya Pitutecha, Rayong Provincial Police Commander Major General Pramote Ngampradit, and Mueang Rayong District Chief Kitipong Urawat. Police filed three charges against the suspect: nighttime trespassing, attempted rape and indecent assault, and online gambling after investigators found evidence on his mobile phone. Photo via Amarin TV Traiphop apologised to the victim and said Rayong province was not ignoring the case. He ordered the Rayong Damrongtham Centre to contact the victim urgently to arrange support for psychological recovery and damages. title: 泰国中餐厅拒收泰铢风波持续发酵！官方回应：涉事餐厅拒绝配合调查
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰国媒体报道，6月5日，针对近日引发社会关注的“中餐厅拒收泰铢”事件，泰国商业部商业发展厅表示，已锁定涉事餐厅，正依法启动追责程序。同时，官方还将联合多部门对曼谷辉煌区展开新一轮专项整治行动，严查非法经营及涉嫌“挂名持股”问题。 泰国商业部商业发展厅厅长普蓬表示，经核查发现，涉事餐厅于2024年注册成立，经营范围包括餐厅、饮品店、咖啡馆、面包店及快餐业务。企业股权结构显示，该公司由1名泰国籍股东与2名中国籍股东共同持股，持股比例分别为51%和49%。 普蓬透露，此前商业发展厅已派人前往调查，传唤公司管理层及股东到场说明情况，但公司及相关股东均未按要求配合调查，有关行为已涉嫌违反会计监察官发出的行政命令。 目前，商业发展厅正依法启动指控程序，将要求相关人员缴纳罚款。同时，案件资料已移交相关部门展开进一步深入调查。 此外，官方对辉煌区企业情况进行全面排查后发现，该区域共有53家高风险法人企业，涉及1999年版《外国人经营法》附录所列相关行业，注册资本介于100万至49.99亿泰铢之间。调查过程中，执法人员还发现，部分被怀疑存在“挂名持股”风险的企业，其股东及会计人员姓名出现在泰国反洗钱办公室公布的HR03重点监控名单中。 对此，商业发展厅已将相关企业资料提交反洗钱办公室，进一步调查资金来源及金融交易情况。同时，相关信息也已转交泰国国家警察总署外国人违法犯罪打击中心、税务局以及曼谷大都会警察局等机构，依法开展后续调查。 官方表示，当天下午，商业发展厅还将联合移民局及就业厅等部门前往辉煌区展开联合执法行动，对涉嫌违法经营的企业进行清查整顿，进一步规范当地商业秩序。 普蓬强调，政府将继续严格执行相关法律，加强跨部门合作，对违法行为采取坚决措施，全面打击非法经营及利用泰国人挂名持股规避法律监管等问题。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：ch7hd_news） The post 泰国中餐厅拒收泰铢风波持续发酵！官方回应：涉事餐厅拒绝配合调查 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 曼谷中餐厅拒收泰铢事件升级 官方启动追责程序
summary_cn: 泰国商业部就中餐厅拒收泰铢事件回应，已锁定涉事餐厅并启动追责程序。该餐厅由泰中混合股东持股，官方指控其拒绝配合调查。商业部将联合多部门在曼谷辉煌区展开专项整治，排查53家「高风险」企业，打击非法经营和「挂名持股」违法行为，防范洗钱风险。

title: Chinese trio smash police patrol car, get arrested in Tak
desc: Chinese trio smash police patrol car, get arrested in Tak Legacy Police in Tak arrested three Chinese men today, June 5, after the trio allegedly smashed residents’ cars , smashed a police patrol vehicle , and tried to steal a motorcycle to flee Phop Phra district. Phop Phra Police Station officers detained 28 year old Yang Luda, 31 year old Feng Zhengdao, and 32 year old Hupan for further questioning. The three accused were taken to Phop Phra Police Station after allegedly damaging property and attempting to flee arrest. The incident occurred at about 10.30am yesterday, June 4, on the Ban Sap Anan to Ban Phadi road in Ruam Thai Phatthana subdistrict, Phop Phra district. Police said the three Chinese men allegedly smashed a police patrol car and seized a resident’s motorcycle to escape. Officers later detained the men. Photo via FM91 Initial questioning found the three accused claimed they had been deceived into travelling to Thailand. They said they were later sent to a location in Myanmar , opposite Phop Phra district, and were trying to find a way out of the area. Before the arrest, police had received several reports from residents about three Chinese men travelling on two moto

title: SIG and WWF mark second-year progress of forest conservation partnership in Thailand
desc: SIG and WWF mark second-year progress of forest conservation partnership in Thailand Legacy A corporate partnership focused on protecting some of Thailand’s most critical forest landscapes has marked two years of measurable progress on the ground, from ranger training and community conservation to technology-assisted wildlife management. SIG , a packaging system solutions provider, and WWF have released a second-year update on their Forests Forward partnership in Thailand, which supports conservation and improved forest management across 60,000 hectares spanning three key landscapes: the Mae Ping–Kaeng Krung forest corridor, the Lower Songkhram River Basin wetlands, and the Dong Phayayen– Thap Lan forest complex . Why these landscapes matter The three areas support biodiversity, ecosystem services and the communities living alongside them. The partnership also contributes to Thailand’s broader 30×30 direction, the national ambition to conserve and restore 30% of terrestrial and marine areas by 2030. title_cn: SIG与WWF推进泰国森林保护合作二周年成果
summary_cn: SIG公司与WWF环保组织的泰国林业保护合作项目已运行两年，覆盖湄平-崀颂森林走廊、下松树河流域湿地和董帕亚延-塔普兰森林等三个关键保护区，总面积6万公顷。项目开展了护林员培训、社区保护、野生动物智能管理等工作，已完成69.72公顷的直接恢复，支持泰国到2030年保护和恢复30%陆地和海洋区域的国家目标。

title: 《给阿嬷的情书》官宣全球上映，即将登陆泰国
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月5日，温情华语电影《给阿嬷的情书》正式公布全球上映计划。影片首轮定档6月18日，在中国香港、中国澳门、新加坡、马来西亚、文莱率先公映。随后，泰国、美国、加拿大、英国、法国、日本、韩国、越南、澳大利亚、新西兰等全球多地也将陆续上映。 《给阿嬷的情书》自4月30日在中国上映以来，目前累计票房已突破15亿元人民币。影片凭借细腻写实的剧情和富有年代感的画面，收获了良好口碑。此次正式进军海外市场，泰国被列入上映地区之一，因此备受关注。 值得一提的是，影片故事背景与泰国有着深厚渊源——片中核心线索“侨批”文化，正是当年泰籍华裔祖辈与家乡之间真实的情感纽带。曼谷石龙路和唐人街一带，曾是最繁忙的侨批汇集中枢。不少影评人认为，这部电影不仅能引发泰籍华裔群体的亲情共鸣，也有助于泰国本土观众了解中泰之间那段鲜为人知的血脉历史。 目前，《给阿嬷的情书》在泰国的具体公映日期尚未最终公布。 （编辑：WAN） The post 《给阿嬷的情书》官宣全球上映，即将登陆泰国 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 华语电影《给阿嬷的情书》全球上映 泰国被纳入档期
summary_cn: 华语温情电影《给阿嬷的情书》宣布全球上映计划，首轮6月18日在香港、澳门、新加坡、马来西亚、文莱公映，泰国等多地随后上映。影片在中国上映后票房超15亿元，蕴含的侨批文化和泰中血缘渊源将引发泰籍华裔群体共鸣，也有助于泰国观众了解两国历史文化联系。

title: 泰国能源巨头的新战场：亚马逊咖啡和Punthai谁更胜一筹？
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月5日，据泰媒报道，提到泰国加油站行业，很多人首先想到的是油价竞争。然而如今，对能源企业而言，吸引消费者的重要工具已不再只是燃油，而是咖啡。 泰国资本市场两大最具代表性的咖啡品牌——隶属于泰国国家石油零售公司的亚马逊咖啡以及隶属于泰国石油天然气运营商PTG Energy的Punthai咖啡，正在成为推动企业增长的重要力量。数据显示，2026年第一季度，两大品牌合计售出超过1.56亿杯咖啡，反映出泰国加油站经营模式正在从单纯依赖燃油销售，逐步转向利润率更高的非油品业务，通过咖啡、餐饮和生活方式服务增强用户黏性并创造长期收益。 在发展策略上，两家企业选择了不同路线。其中，亚马逊咖啡依托庞大的门店网络和海外市场布局持续扩张。近期，OR投资超过3亿泰铢，在曼谷Ari区开设全球首家旗舰店，希望通过旗舰店模式提升消费者体验、强化品牌形象，并推动亚马逊咖啡迈向国际化，打造全球知名的泰国咖啡品牌。 另一边，PTG则采取更积极的门店扩张策略。公司计划在2026年新增约800家Punthai咖啡门店，预计投资额约10亿至15亿泰铢，以加快覆盖全国潜力市场，并进一步巩固Punthai作为集团核心非油品业务的地位。 业内分析认为，从两家公司的投资方向可以看出，咖啡已不再只是加油站里的配套服务，而是成为推动企业增长的重要战略业务。在全球能源转型以及燃油市场竞争日趋激烈的背景下，传统加油站运营商正积极寻找新的利润来源。对于OR和PTG而言，咖啡业务不仅能够提高顾客到店频率和消费停留时间，还能拓展生活方式消费场景，逐渐成长为未来利润和增长的重要引擎。 随着非油品业务占比持续提升，泰国能源企业之间的竞争，也正从“谁卖出更多汽油”，转向“谁能卖出更多咖啡”。 （编译：Juliette；审校：WAN；来源：efinancethai） The post 泰国能源巨头的新战场：亚马逊咖啡和Punthai谁更胜一筹？ appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国能源巨头的新战场：Amazon Coffee 与 Punthai 咖啡竞逐
summary_cn: 泰国加油站行业加速转型，从单纯燃油销售向利润率更高的非油品业务拓展。Amazon Coffee 和 Punthai 两大品牌在 2026 年第一季度合计售出超 1.56 亿杯咖啡。两家采取差异化策略：Amazon Coffee 着眼品质与国际化，在曼谷 Ari 区投资 3 亿泰铢开设全球旗舰店；Punthai 则激进扩张，计划全年新增 800 家门店，投资 10-15 亿泰铢。竞争反映能源企业在转型背景下，正将咖啡等消费场景开发为长期利润增长引擎。
